-- Retail Sales dataset for Portfolio Project #1
-- 3 tables: customers, products, orders

CREATE TABLE customers (
  cust_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT,
  region TEXT,
  segment TEXT
);

CREATE TABLE products (
  product_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  product_name TEXT,
  category TEXT,
  unit_price INTEGER,
  unit_cost INTEGER
);

CREATE TABLE orders (
  order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  cust_id INTEGER,
  product_id INTEGER,
  quantity INTEGER,
  sale_amount INTEGER,
  order_date TEXT
);
